CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2020 Continued To Nov-10-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-22-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Lum of Leonidou & Rosin telephone number 650-691-2888 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Metropolitan Electrical Construction, Inc.
Marianne Recher of Law Office of Marianne Recher telephone number 415-779-4212 for Defendant Redwing Electric LLC.
Osbelia Castillo of Snyder Law, LLP telephone number 805-692-2800 appeared by telephone for Defendant XO Communications, LLC.
Fredrick Crombie of Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP telephone number 415-391-4800 appeared by telephone for Defendant 200 Paul, LLC.

The Court noted that no representative from Redwing Electric was present. Ms. Recher stated that her last contact with Daniel Ginsberg was last week, that she explained that there was a hearing today and that an LLC may not represent itself. Mr. Lum stated that the matter between Redwing and Metropolitan has settled conditionally with payments to be made over several years. Mr. Lum also expressed concern about a stipulation signed by Ms. Recher regarding the writ of attachment which has not been filed being considered invalid because of her being allowed to withdraw. Law Office of Marianne Recher's Motion to Be Releived As Counsel for Defendant Red Wing Electric, LLC is granted conditioned on Redwing Electric not seeking to avoid the stipulation based on lack of authority of Ms. Recher. Ms. Recher is to prepare an order on a Judicial Counsel form and provide it to Mr. Lum.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
